title: dianthus × oenipontanus
intro: Dianthus × oenipontanus, also known as Edelweiss, is a small, alpine flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dianthus × oenipontanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
